case_title: SARAH MERRY VS. ROSALINA LYDSTER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MERRY, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC./BIJOUX BY ROSALINA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED JUN-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-25-2011 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ROSALINA LYDSTER, WHO DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE ON BEHALF OF THE CO-DEFENDANT JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC.BIJOUX BY ROSALINA, INC. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. NO FUTHER CONTINUANCES FOR DEFENDANT. -JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-29-2011 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$37.50) SERVED JUN-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC./BIJOUX BY ROSALINA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED JUN-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (ADVANCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERRY, SARAH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. NOTE: NO MORE CHANGES ALLOWED. - JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN -
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM AUG-29-2011 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JUL-25-2011 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NOTE: NO MORE CHANGES ALLOWED.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 7/6/11 TO JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERRY, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC./BIJOUX BY ROSALINA INC. $179.79 PRINCIPAL, $282.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $462.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LYDSTER, ROSALINA JEWELRY BY ROSALINA INC./BIJOUX BY ROSALINA INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
